caption: The video begins with an exterior shot of the Nuevo Los Cármenes stadium, showcasing its distinctive architecture and surrounding greenery under a partly cloudy sky. The scene transitions to the interior of the stadium, revealing a wide-angle view of the expansive field and the rows of red seats that spell out "GRANADA CF." The stadium is mostly empty, with only a few individuals visible on the field, possibly players or staff preparing for an event. The bright stadium lights are illuminated, casting a warm glow over the area, suggesting that the video was taken during the evening as indicated by the timestamp "20:43" in the first frame. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of anticipation and readiness for an upcoming match or event.
